title: আমাদের সম্পর্কে
content: It is a non-political and human welfare oriented non-government organization steadfast to contribute and promote national development through upgrading the socio-economic condition of the disadvantaged and under-privileged communities of the society. It has been working tirelessly since January 2019. It is a non-political and human welfare oriented non-government organization steadfast to contribute and promote national development.
